name: PASHA Bank OJSC
current_stack: Monolithic Java EE, Oracle DB, On-Premises VMware, SOAP APIs, AngularJS legacy panels
weakness: High maintenance overhead, slow deployment cycles (2 weeks), rigid scaling, high database licensing costs ($12k/month)
ai_solution: Microservices in Kotlin + Spring Boot, Serverless Container Host, Supabase PostgreSQL, GitHub Copilot automated tests, AI code generation pipeline

migration_plan.title: DB Migration & API Wrapper
migration_plan.detail: Migrate core schemas from Oracle to PostgreSQL. Wrap legacy SOAP endpoints in lightweight Kotlin APIs.

migration_plan.title: Serverless & Copilot Integration
migration_plan.detail: Deploy Kotlin microservices to a Serverless Container platform. Equip development teams with LLM code completion and automated testing engines.

migration_plan.title: CI/CD & Final Handoff
migration_plan.detail: Implement fully automated AI-driven regression tests. Deprecate legacy monolithic VMs and roll out new systems with 71% cost savings.

name: SOCAR IT Division
current_stack: Legacy ASP.NET WebForms, MS SQL Server, Manual Excel reports, IIS Windows Server VMs
weakness: Prone to downtime under peak loads, high license footprint, database locking issues, $15k/month server cost
ai_solution: Next.js 14 Serverless, Node.js + NestJS API, PostgreSQL, AI-driven data pipelines for report generation, Docker containerization

migration_plan.title: System Audit & Containerization
migration_plan.detail: Analyze dependency tree of .NET WebForms. Containerize web applications using Docker for cloud readiness.

migration_plan.title: Next.js Frontend & API Rewrite
migration_plan.detail: Build modular Next.js dashboard. Shift computation-heavy reporting to serverless functions and PostgreSQL views.

migration_plan.title: AI Report Integration
migration_plan.detail: Deploy custom report automation engine. Validate pipeline performance and transition off expensive Windows server licensing.

name: Azercell Telecom LLC
current_stack: Monolithic PHP, jQuery, Apache servers, MySQL on-prem clustering, manual customer service operations
weakness: High load latency (>4s) during campaigns, costly server over-provisioning, manual billing reconciliation, $32k/month maintenance
ai_solution: FastAPI with Python, Redis Cache, AWS ECS Fargate, Gemini-based automated customer query routing & billing assistant

migration_plan.title: Schema Refactoring & AWS Setup
migration_plan.detail: Migrate MySQL clusters to AWS RDS. Establish Fargate orchestration and secure AWS networking configurations.

migration_plan.title: AI Customer Agent Sandbox
migration_plan.detail: Develop and fine-tune LLM billing & query agents. Build the Python FastAPI communication layer.

migration_plan.title: Production Rollout
migration_plan.detail: Redirect 60% of routine support tickets to the AI agent. Terminate legacy physical servers, realizing a 71% cost reduction.

name: Kapital Bank
current_stack: C#/.NET Core Monoliths, Oracle Database, RedHat OpenShift, manual code review workflows
weakness: Slow code pipeline throughput, elevated infrastructure idle times, high vendor support cost, $28k/month overall cost
ai_solution: Spring Boot Microservices, Supabase Managed DB, GitHub Advanced Security with AI remediation, automated CI/CD pipelines

migration_plan.title: Architecture Decomposition
migration_plan.detail: Decompose monolithic APIs into isolated microservices. Map Oracle structures to Postgres schemas.

migration_plan.title: CI/CD & AI SecOps Integration
migration_plan.detail: Integrate AI security scanners into GitHub pipelines. Setup managed database clusters on cloud.

migration_plan.title: Final Switchover
migration_plan.detail: Deploy services in parallel, run automated integration tests, and shift production traffic dynamically to achieve 70% savings.
